1841660.name: nanos world™
1841660.description:
nanos world is the next-generation open world multiplayer sandbox. Inspired by the golden age of creative gaming such as Garry's Mod, SA-MP and FiveM, it provides the ultimate platform for players to enjoy unlimited variety and for creators to build their visions with the full power of Lua & Unreal Engine 5.

🌍 LIMITLESS SANDBOX FREEDOM

Whether you want to join a hardcore Roleplay (RP) server, compete in tactical shooters, or just mess around with physics-based contraptions, nanos world is whatever you make of it. With no predefined goals, the only limit is your imagination.

🛠️ BUILD WITH UNREAL ENGINE 5

nanos world gives you direct access to modern engine features. Import your own FBX models, custom maps, and assets directly from the latest version of Unreal Engine 5 into the game.

🤖 POWERFUL LUA SCRIPTING

We provide a fast, intuitive scripting API and a modern game-play framework, so you can focus on creativity instead of boilerplate code. Our complete Official Documentation provides everything you need to learn and start creating your packages right away! Created by developers for developers.

🎈 THE ULTIMATE MULTIPLAYER EXPERIENCE

  • Own Networking: we built a totally custom networking layer, proving an extremely lightweight server that handles thousands of entities spawned at the same time.
  • Native Multiplayer: everything you script is already natively synced.
  • Synchronized Physics: all the entity physics is synchronized with out network authority system.
  • Dedicated Servers: lightweight, reliable server software for Windows and Linux.
  • Built-in VOIP: for local or remote in-game talk.
  • Integrated Vault & Store: Share anything you create in our integrated Vault, making easier for other players to download an play.

🛍️ COMMUNITY CONTENT

All Players can create, download and share their own Scripts, Packages, Addons, Maps and Models through the fully integrated Vault, which any server can easily import as UGC.

💡 INSPIRED BY THE GREATS

nanos world takes great inspiration from the golden sandbox games such as Garry's Mod, SA-MP, MTA and FiveM. We are big fans and grew up playing these. And we now have the great ambition to create a huge successor using cutting-edge technology, providing all the tools in a simple and very efficient way!

🗝️ KEY FEATURES

For Players:
  • 🎈 Synchronized Physics!
  • 🏪 Built-in Vault & Store.
  • 🤌 Pleasant Mechanics.
  • 🗺️ Really big Maps.
  • 🎮 Unlimited quality game-modes.
  • 🌊 Dynamic Water Physics.
  • 🚀 Performance Optimized.
  • 🔊 Integrated VO-IP.
  • 🐧 Runs on Linux with Proton (actively tested).

For Developers:
  • 🐣 Easy Scripting & Modding.
  • 🧱 Import any Unreal Engine Assets & Maps.
  • 📺 Web UI user interface.
  • 🤖 AI Nav Mesh/Path Finding included!
  • 🚀 Fast and reliable Dedicated Server.
  • 💾 Integrated Database connectors.
  • 🌐 All Networking already included.
  • 🕹️ Input system integrated with the Settings.
  • 🔄️ Live Reloading while developing scripts.
  • 💑 Supportive Community.
  • 👺 Bugs resolved fast.

🤗 HANDSOME COMMUNITY

We actively work to maintain a healthy environment in our community! All members are part of our family. We know how important it is to have an active, partnering community. No toxicity allowed! You won't be ridiculed for asking for help. We are here to help beginners become better developers!

🔫 WISHLIST NOW & REGISTER TO BECOME A TESTER IN OUR DISCORD!
